segments.text: Basically, fair as a startup option
segments.original_text: 基本的にこの空前始動であったり

segments.text: And edgeguarding when you send them offstage
segments.original_text: 崖外に出した時の復帰阻止っていうところが

segments.text: The execution is still really tough
segments.original_text: やっぱり難易度は高い

full_text: Basically, fair as a startup option and edgeguarding when you send them offstage become the main strategies, but the execution is still really tough because of this long reach
